items.location: Cow Head · Gros Morne National Park
items.title: Nurse Myra Bennett Centre for the Performing Arts
items.body: Built from scratch: a 2,000-square-metre, 178-seat multi-functional theatre complex, the permanent home of the Gros Morne Theatre Festival. A landmark performing arts venue delivered in a community of 425, inside a national park, on the west coast of Newfoundland.
items.alt: Nurse Myra Bennett Centre for the Performing Arts, built by Pittmans

items.location: Seven Corners · Gros Morne National Park
items.title: Seven Corners Lookout
items.body: Sculptural timber viewing structures above Bonne Bay: curved custom woodwork with panoramic apertures that frame the landscape itself. Precision carpentry, built to stand in a national park.
items.alt: Bonne Bay framed through the timber viewing aperture at Seven Corners, built by Pittmans

items.title: Schools, Arenas & Public Buildings
items.body: Schools built new from the ground up. Arenas and recreation facilities across the province. Public and institutional buildings that communities use every day, delivered as general contractor with civil and electrical self-performed.
items.alt: School built new by Pittmans, full building elevation

items.title: Marine Infrastructure
items.body: Wharf construction and coastal structures, from working wharves to armour stone breakwaters, including current works at Pinsent's Arm, Labrador. Certified marine and structural concrete capability, start to finish.
items.alt: Pittmans long reach excavator on coastal marine works at sunset

items.title: Municipal Infrastructure
items.body: Water, sewer, storm, and road infrastructure for towns across Newfoundland and Labrador. Underground services installed to GPS grade control and verified against the survey record.
items.alt: Pittmans crew installing underground municipal services with GPS-equipped excavator

items.title: Mining Exploration Support
items.body: Remote camp mobilization and sitework for active mineral exploration in coastal Labrador: pad construction, modular camp installation, and access development, executed on compressed timelines with our own fleet, including company float capacity to 75 tonnes.
items.alt: Exploration camp and crushed rock pad built by Pittmans in coastal Labrador
